description: Find the vinyl record when Lucas messages about music

element2.creation_context: Lucas might ask about music for the evening

element3.detected_activity_raw: User is monitoring steak on pan #1

encoding_info.encoding_text: Lucas might ask you to prepare a vinyl record. If he messages about it, go to the study and find the record on the desk — it has a car illustration on the cover, titled Night Drive. Put it by the record player in the living room.

confirmation_question.question: What is on the record cover?

distractor_info.distractor_description: Black sleeve with abstract art, titled Dark Side, same desk

trigger_info.trigger_event: Phone message: Lucas asks about music
